data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Design principle that suggests making UI elements easier to interact with by considering target size and distance.
data.technical_spec: Large interactive elements in easy-to-reach areas, especially on mobile.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Improving decision-making efficiency by minimizing choices.
data.technical_spec: Simplified navigation and tailored content suggestions.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Designs take into account users' limited memory capacity by chunking information.
data.technical_spec: Playlists, cards, and other groupings in the UI.

data.title: Peak-End Rule
data.description: Focusing on creating impactful moments to improve overall user satisfaction.
data.technical_spec: Highlighting personalized playlists and providing a satisfying streaming experience.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Leveraging familiar design patterns to match user expectations.
data.technical_spec: Consistent UI with other popular apps for intuitive interaction.
